name: onspeed-docs-tests
description: Node tests for code that ships in the docs-site (replay tool, future tone-sim, etc.). Run with `npm test` from this directory.

scripts.test: node replay/replay-row-identity.mjs && node replay/m5modes-render-smoke.mjs && node replay/m5sim-smoke.mjs && node replay/mp4Export-smoke.mjs && node replay/persistence-smoke.mjs && node replay/fileHandles-smoke.mjs && node replay/sidecar-schema-smoke.mjs && node replay/sidecar-write-smoke.mjs && node replay/sidecar-discovery-smoke.mjs && node replay/session-lifecycle-smoke.mjs && node replay/sidecar-matching-smoke.mjs
